# Python dependencies for src/llm/ (native LLM provider integrations) and
# their test suite in tests/. Each provider SDK is imported lazily inside
# its own module, so a missing optional SDK only affects that one
# provider at runtime — but the test suite exercises all of them, so all
# are installed here for CI.
#
# All dependencies below are pinned by version and hash (Scorecard Pinned-Dependencies).
# To upgrade: edit the ranges in the pip-compile command comment block below,
# then regenerate with: pip-compile --generate-hashes --allow-unsafe --strip-extras
#
# This file is autogenerated by pip-compile with Python 3.13
# by the following command:
#
#    pip-compile --allow-unsafe --generate-hashes --output-file=requirements-hashed.txt --strip-extras requirements.in
#
